---
title: "NBA Recruits"
author: Ethan
format: html
---

```{r}
#| cache: true
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)

basketball_tibble <- read_excel("data/nba_recruits.xlsx") |>
  mutate(
    tier = factor(
      tier,
      levels = c("Never played", "Brief career", "Solid career", "All-Star level", "Superstar"),
      ordered = TRUE
    ),
    recruit_group = factor(
      recruit_group,
      levels = c("#1–10", "#11–25", "#26–50", "#51–100", "Outside top 100"),
      ordered = TRUE
    )
  )

basketball_tibble
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

plot_data <- basketball_tibble |>
  filter(!is.na(rank), !is.na(top_mean_wa))

highlight_names <- c("LeBron James", "Kevin Durant", "Stephen Curry", "Giannis Antetokounmpo", "Kawhi Leonard", "Nikola Jokic")

plot_data |>
  ggplot(aes(x = rank, y = top_mean_wa, color = tier)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "grey40") +
  geom_text(
    data = plot_data |> filter(name %in% highlight_names),
    aes(label = name),
    vjust = -0.6,
    check_overlap = FALSE
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Recruit rank vs. top mean win shares above replacement",
    x = "Recruit rank",
    y = "Top mean win shares above replacement",
    color = "Career tier"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
